history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person in the foreground stands on a grassy slope looking out over layered mountain peaks at sunrise or sunset.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a person standing with their back to the camera, wearing a light-colored hooded jacket and dark pants, with a dark backpack on their back. Their head is slightly turned to the right, and they are standing upright while looking toward the distant mountains.

Setting:
The scene is outdoors on a hillside or trail edge with tall grasses in the lower right foreground. In the background, multiple mountain ridges and peaks fade into a misty, hazy valley. The sky near the horizon is colored in warm orange and soft yellow tones, transitioning to pale blue higher up, suggesting early morning or evening light.

Visual Details:
The lighting is soft and warm near the horizon, creating a gentle glow over the distant clouds and mountains. The mountains appear in layers, with haze reducing contrast as they recede into the distance. The foreground grasses are green and yellowish, some blades catching the light. Other people are visible further down the path on the left side, standing or walking near the trail.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a hiker standing on a grassy slope with a backpack, viewing vast misty mountains. Other hikers are visible farther down a trail while the sky glows with warm colors at the horizon.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

No readable text is visible in this screenshot.

# Structured Version

- [No extracted text — screenshot appears to contain only a landscape photo with no visible UI/text.]

# Notes

- The image contains a scenic view (mountains/valley at sunrise/sunset) but no legible words, labels, UI elements, or captions.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A lone figure, seen from behind, stands on a rocky mountain path, looking out at a breathtaking sunrise. The person is wearing a light-colored hooded jacket and a backpack, with dark pants. They are positioned in the foreground, slightly to the right of center, with their back to the viewer, emphasizing the vastness of the landscape.

The background is dominated by a stunning vista of mountains and valleys, shrouded in a soft morning mist. Several peaks rise in the distance, silhouetted against a vibrant sky painted with hues of orange, yellow, and soft blue, indicative of an early dawn. A larger, darker mountain looms to the right, its slopes descending into the misty valley below. The sky transitions from a warm, fiery orange near the horizon to a pale, serene blue overhead.

Below the main peaks, a valley floor is visible, with hints of human settlements or terraced fields, suggesting a populated area at a distance. The path leading up to the vantage point is rocky and uneven, with sparse vegetation consisting of dry grasses and small shrubs, particularly noticeable in the lower right corner of the image. Other hikers are visible on the path below the main figure, appearing as small, dark shapes, suggesting a communal ascent or a popular hiking spot.

The lighting is soft and warm, characteristic of sunrise, casting a gentle glow over the entire scene and highlighting the atmospheric perspective. The overall color palette is a mix of warm oranges and yellows in the sky, contrasted with the cool blues and greens of the distant mountains and valleys, and the earthy tones of the rocky terrain. The mood is one of awe, tranquility, and the sublime beauty of nature, evoking a sense of adventure and peaceful contemplation. The style is realistic, capturing the grandeur of the natural landscape and the solitary human experience within it.
